overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character transitioning from walking to running through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The character moves from beneath an elevated highway through neon-lit commercial streets to an intersection, navigating around pedestrians and vehicles in a dense urban environment.

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway structure, moving through the industrial district

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure casting shadows over the street
tall industrial structures with metal scaffolding and red accents
towering glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in an industrial district of Night City. The area is sparsely populated with a few vehicles passing by, while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distance against the dusk sky.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running
pedestrians begin appearing on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: breaking into a run while navigating along the street, passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top and blue shorts running ahead of the character

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and storefronts
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character accelerates to a run along the street as the environment transitions from industrial to commercial. Pedestrians appear on the sidewalks, and the elevated highway structure shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera moves forward.

events.description: ambient light dims significantly as dusk transitions to night, neon signs become prominent

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the commercial district, weaving between pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green illuminated corporate signage on building facade

segments.scene_description: Running through the commercial heart of the district, neon signs including a prominent 'softsys' sign illuminate the darkening street. The elevated highway disappears from view as the character moves deeper into the dense urban environment with moderate pedestrian traffic.

events.description: character turns right at the intersection, entering the crosswalk area
vehicles wait at the intersection as the character crosses the street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the street through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
multi-story commercial building with prominent green neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at a busy intersection, navigating through the crosswalk as vehicles wait at the traffic signals. The 'softsys' building now dominates the left side of the frame, and the scene is fully immersed in night-time urban lighting with moderate traffic and pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sparse industrial underpass into the neon-drenched heart of a bustling commercial district at dusk. It begins with the character walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, where futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distance under a darkening sky. As the character accelerates into a run, the industrial surroundings give way to commercial streets and the highway structure shifts to the right before disappearing entirely. The scene then immerses itself in the dense urban center, where glowing neon signs like the prominent softsys display illuminate the street and pedestrian traffic increases. Finally, the camera turns right at a busy intersection, navigating through a crosswalk amidst waiting vehicles as the softsys building dominates the frame under full nighttime lighting.
